parameters.query:
SELECT l.id as lead_id, l.phone, l.name, l.niche, l.funnel_stage, l.user_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM followups WHERE lead_id = l.id), 0) as followup_count,
  l.next_followup_at,
  l.updated_at
FROM leads l
WHERE l.next_followup_at <= NOW()
  AND l.next_followup_at IS NOT NULL
  AND l.funnel_stage NOT IN ('closed', 'lost', 'call_scheduled')
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM followups WHERE lead_id = l.id) < 5
ORDER BY l.next_followup_at ASC
LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO conversations (lead_id, phone, role, message)
VALUES ({{ $('Determinar Acción').first().json.lead_id }}::INT, '{{ $('Determinar Acción').first().json.phone }}', 'assistant', $TAG$[CRON FOLLOWUP] {{ $('Determinar Acción').first().json.mensaje }}$TAG$);
